seo.title: Terms of use
seo.description: Website terms placeholder for Energy Storage Enclosure. Replace before production.

sections.title: Terms of Use
sections.description: Structural placeholder. Replace with jurisdiction-appropriate counsel-reviewed terms.

sections.title: Scope
sections.description: A production document should cover acceptable use, intellectual property, disclaimers, liability limits, governing law, and updates.

items.question: Who operates this site?
items.answer: The legal entity is defined by company.legalName in site.config.ts.

items.question: Are marketing specifications binding?
items.answer: Clarify in your production terms whether website content is illustrative or contractual.
